title: Refactor a cond to multi-clause function heads (role router)
prompt: Rewrite MyApp.RoleRouter.route/1 from test_fixtures/cond_role_router.ex as multi-clause function heads. Pattern-match on the user map's `:role` and `:active` keys directly in the head (e.g., `def route(%{role: "admin", active: true})`). Include a catch-all final clause that returns `:unauthorized`. Output only the `route/1` function inside `defmodule MyApp.RoleRouter do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Direct 1:1 mapping from cond clauses to function heads. No ambiguity.
